Config.title: Application Configuration
Config.description: Stores global configuration settings for the video downloader.

apiUrl.description: The primary API endpoint for video analysis.

apiKey.description: Optional API key for the downloader service.

autoFailover.description: Whether to automatically switch to failover API on error.

updatedAt.description: Last time the config was updated.

settings/config.description: Single document containing the global application settings.
